title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 447.626 - Expeditious treatment
text:
447.626.  Expeditious treatment. — Any action brought pursuant to the provisions of sections 447.620 to 447.640 shall be expedited by the court and may be given precedence over other suits.  Trial shall be by the court without a jury.
(L. 1993 S.B. 376 § 4)
